on_entry: /execute at @s[type=ftb_tc:earth_slime_seed_entity] if block ~ ~-1 ~ dirt [] run particle minecraft:crop_growth_emitter ~ ~0.05 ~
/execute at @s[type=ftb_tc:earth_slime_seed_entity] if block ~ ~-1 ~ dirt [] run playsound item.bone_meal.use @p ~ ~ ~ 0.35 1.0 0.35
/execute at @s[type=ftb_tc:earth_slime_seed_entity] if block ~ ~-1 ~ dirt [] run setblock ~ ~-1 ~ ftb_tc:earth_grass [] replace
